sideSwapPolicy.halfPolicy: The same six industry-judgment topics are reused after side swap; overtime is out of scope for v1.
sideSwapPolicy.sideRoleResolution: The current defense side must generate defenseProof from the selected topic; the current attack side must generate attackChallenge from the same selected topic.
sideSwapPolicy.teamIdentityRule: Team style and agent specialization must not be interpreted as fixed attack/defense ownership.
hardGuards: Do not hard-code Falcon-7B as permanent attack or VitaLLMty as permanent defense.
Do not bind defenseThesisFocus or attackChallengeFocus to a team slug before resolving current side assignment.
For map rounds 7-12, reuse topics R1-R6 with swapped side roles.

packs.topicTitle: 全球有色价格是否支持景气上行
packs.defenseThesisFocus: 用全球金属价格趋势证明有色行业具备景气上行线索。
packs.attackChallengeFocus: 指出全球价格不能直接等同于中国国内供需、库存或现货紧张。

facts.statement: FRED series PCOPPUSDM (Global price of Copper) is configured as a global copper price proxy for 全球有色价格是否支持景气上行; it does not prove China domestic inventory, spot premium, or supply-demand tightness.
policyNotes: These series are global price proxies.
They do not directly prove China domestic supply-demand conditions.

facts.statement: FRED series PALUMUSDM (Global price of Aluminum) is configured as a global aluminum price proxy for 全球有色价格是否支持景气上行; it does not prove China domestic inventory, spot premium, or supply-demand tightness.
policyNotes: These series are global price proxies.
They do not directly prove China domestic supply-demand conditions.

facts.statement: FRED series PNICKUSDM (Global price of Nickel) is configured as a global nickel price proxy for 全球有色价格是否支持景气上行; it does not prove China domestic inventory, spot premium, or supply-demand tightness.
policyNotes: These series are global price proxies.
They do not directly prove China domestic supply-demand conditions.

facts.statement: FRED series PZINCUSDM (Global price of Zinc) is configured as a global zinc price proxy for 全球有色价格是否支持景气上行; it does not prove China domestic inventory, spot premium, or supply-demand tightness.
policyNotes: These series are global price proxies.
They do not directly prove China domestic supply-demand conditions.

scoreCaps.reason: First-phase evidence is limited to free API proxy facts and must surface missing domestic inventory, spot, SHFE/SMM, and filing anchors.

promptFacts.shortText: FRED series PCOPPUSDM (Global price of Copper) is configured as a global copper price proxy for 全球有色价格是否支持景气上行; it does not prove China domestic inventory, spot premium, or supply-demand tightness.

FRED series PALUMUSDM (Global price of Aluminum) is configured as a global aluminum price proxy for 全球有色价格是否支持景气上行; it does not prove China domestic inventory, spot premium, or supply-demand tightness.
FRED series PNICKUSDM (Global price of Nickel) is configured as a global nickel price proxy for 全球有色价格是否支持景气上行; it does not prove China domestic inventory, spot premium, or supply-demand tightness.
FRED series PZINCUSDM (Global price of Zinc) is configured as a global zinc price proxy for 全球有色价格是否支持景气上行; it does not prove China domestic inventory, spot premium, or supply-demand tightness.

allowedClaims: FRED 显示全球金属价格环境偏正面。
BaoStock 显示 A 股有色代表公司可能正在交易价格预期。
Comtrade 可作为进出口方向线索。
有限证据下可给中性偏多或低仓位观察。
缺少国内库存、加工费、开工率、下游订单和公司财务验证，应设置 scoreCaps。
cappedClaims: Missing domestic_inventory; related claims must be downgraded or capped.
Missing domestic_spot_premium; related claims must be downgraded or capped.
Missing shfe_warehouse_receipt; related claims must be downgraded or capped.
prohibitedClaims: 中国有色需求已经确认改善。
代表公司盈利已经改善。
进出口变化直接证明国内供需反转。
证据已经支持重仓进攻。
代理事实足以替代完整行业数据库。
These series are global price proxies.
They do not directly prove China domestic supply-demand conditions.

packs.attackChallengeFocus: 指出市场表现不能证明行业基本面，也可能只是风险偏好或资金风格变化。

packs.topicTitle: 进出口数据是否支持供需变化
packs.defenseThesisFocus: 用可选 UN Comtrade 的铜矿砂、铝土矿、精炼铜等 HS 线索观察贸易趋势。
packs.attackChallengeFocus: 指出进出口数据滞后，且不能替代国内库存、现货和行业利润。

facts.statement: UN Comtrade HS 260300 (铜矿砂及其精矿) is configured as a lagged trade proxy for 进出口数据是否支持供需变化; it cannot replace China domestic inventory, spot premium, or industry profit evidence.
policyNotes: HS mapping must be reviewed before being used as strong evidence.
UN Comtrade is lagged and cannot replace domestic inventory or spot premium evidence.

facts.statement: UN Comtrade HS 260600 (铝矿砂及其精矿) is configured as a lagged trade proxy for 进出口数据是否支持供需变化; it cannot replace China domestic inventory, spot premium, or industry profit evidence.

scoreCaps.reason: First-phase evidence is limited to free API proxy facts and must surface missing domestic inventory, spot, SHFE/SMM, and filing anchors.

promptFacts.shortText: FRED series PCOPPUSDM (Global price of Copper) is configured as a global copper price proxy for 基于有限证据的配置倾向与风险边界; it does not prove China domestic inventory, spot premium, or supply-demand tightness.

FRED series PALUMUSDM (Global price of Aluminum) is configured as a global aluminum price proxy for 基于有限证据的配置倾向与风险边界; it does not prove China domestic inventory, spot premium, or supply-demand tightness.

紫金矿业 (sh.601899) is configured as a representative A-share nonferrous proxy with copper_gold exposure; BaoStock can support market reaction and valuation proxy only, not confirmed industry fundamentals.
江西铜业 (sh.600362) is configured as a representative A-share nonferrous proxy with copper exposure; BaoStock can support market reaction and valuation proxy only, not confirmed industry fundamentals.
中国铝业 (sh.601600) is configured as a representative A-share nonferrous proxy with aluminum exposure; BaoStock can support market reaction and valuation proxy only, not confirmed industry fundamentals.
铜陵有色 (sz.000630) is configured as a representative A-share nonferrous proxy with copper exposure; BaoStock can support market reaction and valuation proxy only, not confirmed industry fundamentals.
云南铜业 (sz.000878) is configured as a representative A-share nonferrous proxy with copper exposure; BaoStock can support market reaction and valuation proxy only, not confirmed industry fundamentals.

allowedClaims: FRED 显示全球金属价格环境偏正面。
BaoStock 显示 A 股有色代表公司可能正在交易价格预期。
Comtrade 可作为进出口方向线索。
有限证据下可给中性偏多或低仓位观察。
缺少国内库存、加工费、开工率、下游订单和公司财务验证，应设置 scoreCaps。
cappedClaims: Missing domestic_micro_data; related claims must be downgraded or capped.
Missing filing_page_anchor; related claims must be downgraded or capped.
Missing positioning_and_crowding; related claims must be downgraded or capped.
prohibitedClaims: 中国有色需求已经确认改善。
代表公司盈利已经改善。
进出口变化直接证明国内供需反转。
证据已经支持重仓进攻。
代理事实足以替代完整行业数据库。
These series are global price proxies.
They do not directly prove China domestic supply-demand conditions.

sideSwapPolicy.interpretation: These six topics define the subject of dispute, not fixed team ownership.
sideSwapPolicy.defenseThesisFocus: Consumed by whichever team is the current defense side.
sideSwapPolicy.attackChallengeFocus: Consumed by whichever team is the current attack side.
sideSwapPolicy.sideSwapRule: When sides swap, the same six topics are reused and proof/challenge responsibilities swap with the current side.

sourceWarnings: BaoStock live observations are not fetched by this JS MVP; configured universe facts are used as proxy scaffolding.
